message:
chore(deps): bump regex 1.11.1 → 1.12.3

Minor-level bump. Cargo.lock already resolved to 1.12.3 via transitive
resolution; only the workspace manifest floor moves.

regex 1.12 is a non-breaking series (per upstream policy — breaking
changes land only in 2.0). Public API surface used by fp-frame
(`Regex::new`, `Regex::is_match`, `Regex::captures`, `Regex::replace`)
is unchanged.

Verification:
- `rch exec -- cargo check --workspace --all-targets` → OK
- `rch exec -- cargo test -p fp-frame --lib` → 1382 passed, 0 failed

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
